title: SPECTROPHOTOMETRIC DETERMINATION OF CADMIUM ION WITH CADION IREA REAGENT
author: Turayeva, M.J.
license_note: Zenodo record metadata license field: cc-by-4.0
description: The determination of cadmium ions in environmental samples is an extremely important task, for which a spectrophotometric method is proposed in the research work. Cadion IREA is proposed as an analytical sensitive reagent for the determination of cadmium ions. The reflectance spectra of cadmium ions with Cadion IREA reagent were obtained on an EMC-30PC-UV-1800 Spectrophotometer.
steps_raw: The determination of cadmium ions in environmental samples is an extremely important task, for which a spectrophotometric method is proposed in the research work.
